title: pilea laxa
intro: Pilea laxa is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, native to tropical Asia and commonly known as the "Alang-Ilang". The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pilea laxa include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pilea laxa is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
